hypotheses.name: PC1 Biological Identity at L11
hypotheses.method: At L11 (67.6% variance in PC1), project 209 named genes onto PC1. Mann-Whitney AUROC for TF vs non-TF, HLA membership, AP1 family. Spearman(TRRUST hub degree, PC1). Per-layer TF AUROC on PC1.
hypotheses.next_action: PC1 identity at L11 remains unexplained by simple binary features. Try continuous biological features (gene expression variance, RNA-seq signal strength) or focus on the JUN-top / FOS-bottom / LCK-top / HLA-bottom pattern as cell-type axis hypothesis.

hypotheses.name: TRRUST Activator/Repressor Geometric Polarity
hypotheses.method: 116 activation and 64 repression TRRUST named-gene pairs. Test Act vs Rep targets on PC1 at L11 (AUROC + MWU). Per-layer polarity AUROC. Within-TF deltas for 10 TFs with >=2 act and >=2 rep named targets. L2 distance comparison act vs rep pairs at L11.
hypotheses.result_value: AUROC=0.514, p=0.794; per-layer max=0.527 at L1; L2 dist p=0.178 (mean_act=7.64 vs mean_rep=9.04); within-TF: ETS1 delta=+10.85 but n_rep=2
hypotheses.next_action: Directional encoding not found at population level. Within-TF ETS1 delta is suggestive but requires >=5 pairs. Could revisit with STRING MOR annotations if available.

hypotheses.name: Dorothea Threshold Sensitivity + PR Elbow Alignment
hypotheses.method: Swept 5 Dorothea confidence thresholds (0.25=D+, 0.50=C+, 0.625=B+, 0.75=B+, 1.0=A-only). AUROC vs 500 random null pairs from all 209 named genes. Compared best-AUROC layer vs PR-collapse curve (from iter_0026 H03).
hypotheses.result_value: All thresholds: AUROC 0.444-0.451 (all < 0.5); best at L8 for C+/B+/A. Contradicts iter_0026 AUROC=0.658. Discrepancy attributed to null construction: same-gene-pool null vs population-level null.
hypotheses.next_action: Retire simple Dorothea-vs-null regulatory proximity as main evidence. Prior positive results appear null-sensitive (hub centrality confound). Can still use Dorothea for directional/confidence-tier differential tests with matched null.
